overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage beginning with a character interaction under a construction overpass, followed by a continuous drive along a highway at dusk. The scene features neon-lit billboards, a towering skyscraper with digital advertisements, and moderate vehicle traffic against a backdrop of mountains and industrial structures.

events.description: character in blue vest stands over a fallen person on the ground
character walks away from the fallen person toward a parked vehicle
vintage sedan begins moving and exits the construction area onto the highway

agents.ego_description: stands over a fallen person, then walks away as the scene transitions to vehicle departure

notable_agents.action: character in formal attire standing over a fallen person in a blue jacket
vintage silver sedan starting its engine and pulling away from the construction site

entered.detail: yellow construction excavator with extended arm near a white canopy tent
massive concrete pillars supporting the highway overpass above
classic silver car with tail fins parked under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Under a concrete overpass in a construction zone, a character stands over a fallen person before walking away. A vintage sedan parked nearby starts its engine and begins to drive off, transitioning the scene from a static confrontation to vehicle movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway with neon signage and mountain backdrop

events.description: exits the covered construction area onto the open highway with city skyline visible
camera moves from the main road to the shoulder overlooking a drainage gully

agents.ego_description: driving along the highway at moderate speed, transitioning from the construction zone to open road

entered.detail: elevated highway structure with distinctive red neon underlighting
large digital billboard displaying bright red neon advertisement against the dusk sky
tall metal electrical transmission tower with multiple cable lines
distant mountain silhouette visible on the horizon against the cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives onto the open highway, leaving the construction site behind. The camera passes under a red-lit overpass and moves along the road with mountains visible in the distance, power lines running parallel, and large digital billboards illuminating the dusk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway passing commercial district with towering illuminated skyscraper

events.description: multiple vehicles pass by including black sedans and white vans with headlights on
van overtakes on the right while other vehicles maintain speed in left lanes

agents.ego_description: driving along the curving highway with moderate traffic, navigating past other vehicles while approaching the skyscraper

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking with bright headlights in the left lane
white van driving parallel in the right lane

entered.detail: massive glass skyscraper with large illuminated red and blue billboard near the top

segments.scene_description: Driving toward a towering skyscraper with vibrant neon billboards, the highway curves gently to the right. Moderate traffic flows in both directions with various sedans and vans passing by, while industrial buildings and smokestacks appear on the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving highway through industrial district with distant city lights

events.description: road curves to the left around the base of the skyscraper, changing the perspective
line of vehicle headlights visible ahead on the curving road

agents.ego_description: navigating the left curve of the highway, maintaining speed with the flow of traffic

notable_agents.action: truck with covered cargo driving ahead on the curving road

entered.detail: low industrial buildings with smokestacks visible in the distance against the darkening sky

segments.scene_description: The highway curves left around the skyscraper, which now recedes into the background. The road passes through an industrial area with warehouses and smokestacks on the left, while vehicles with headlights on navigate the bend ahead. The sky darkens as the drive continues into the industrial district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a gritty urban confrontation under a construction overpass into a high-speed drive through a neon-lit industrial district at dusk. It begins in a concrete construction zone where a character walks away from a fallen person, before the camera follows a vintage sedan as it ignites and pulls away from the scene. As the vehicle merges onto the open highway, the environment shifts from the static construction site to a sprawling road lined with power lines and red-lit overpasses, with distant mountains framing the horizon. The scene then expands as the car curves toward a towering skyscraper adorned with vibrant neon billboards, passing moderate traffic and industrial smokestacks. Finally, the highway bends left, leaving the skyscraper behind as the camera glides deeper into a darkening industrial area filled with warehouses and the glow of oncoming headlights.
